query: Holo-World complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: Super Holo Wars by TShadowKnight
results.content:
- Considering that the game requires very few controls to play, I would like to know if it is possible to rebind they keys so that I can play with one hand without having to reach across the keyboard.

- There are a few spelling errors in Chapter 5. A notable one is "uints" which I assume should be "units". Also I think it was in Chapter 3, but one of the conditions was to "Defend the HoloX". "Defend HoloX" would suffice, or rather use the name of their HoloGear.

- IRyS' portrait bothers me, namely her right eye (the pink one) looks distorted and a little too far to the side. If you could center it a little... [...] Reply

Kachopper92 years ago

Also, feels like HoloMyth is lacking something, only 3 elements and nothing really outstanding other then the 4 characters

Reply

Shine402 years ago [...] - I'm really happy that the game has mouse support. You can even click and drag to move the map (THANK YOU!). I know left click is usually confirm, and right click is cancel or back although it has been a little inconsistent for me. Like "Select Assist" or "Select Action" on the battle screen I can open with Left Click, but Right click doesn't close them and I have to reach up to the ESC or C key to go back. On the map screen, it would be very convenient if I could just right click to open the menu to End the Turn.

- Speaking of ending turns, if I try to end a turn when a Unit can still move, the warning window pops up. Thank you for that, BUT the mouse doesn't seem to work on that window.

results.title: Is It Worth Using? : r/ShareAiPrompts
results.content:
# Who Should Look Elsewhere

If you primarily need long-form blog content, tools like Jasper may serve you better. Users who absolutely require free trials before any financial commitment will find the paywall frustrating. Businesses in highly regulated industries requiring extensive compliance review may find the human oversight demands offset some time savings. Those with extremely tight budgets who can't risk even the refund-protected trial period should explore free alternatives first.

# Final Verdict: Is Holo AI Worth It?

After analyzing user reviews, comparing features, and understanding the competitive landscape, Holo AI earns a solid recommendation for its target audience—founders and small teams who need to scale content production without scaling costs. [...] Small business owners particularly appreciate how Holo "made them look like a pro marketing agency" without the agency price tag. Solo founders highlight the ability to have content ready "without babysitting"—set it up, and wake up to fresh content ideas ready for review.

The ease of use gets frequent mention. Multiple reviewers note that setup takes under 10 minutes, and no technical or design skills are required. For non-marketers who dread content creation, this accessibility is a significant selling point.

# The Criticisms [...] # What Real Users Are Saying

Holo maintains a 4.4 out of 5 rating on Trustpilot across over 200 reviews. The rating breakdown shows 71% five-star reviews with 10% one-star reviews—a distribution that suggests generally positive experiences with some notable exceptions.

# The Praise

The most consistent positive feedback centers on time savings and brand voice accuracy. Users report that Holo captures their brand voice within about 10 minutes of website analysis, with the system continuing to refine its understanding as you generate and edit more content. One user mentioned saving 15-20 hours monthly at $59/month—doing the math, that's incredibly cost-effective compared to their own hourly value or hiring help.

And this is usually how birds are not looking like when they are sitting in an environment like this. So, there are lots of uncanny features already present in this photo. Now, the worst news is that that is actually one of the best photos I got out of it because this one is a bit weird because it is showing the thermal view on the opposite side of the camera. And also, there's no lens cover. And then here, this one looks best by a quick look, but also the product looks entirely different than what it's actually like. And also, this looks like a hunter, not like a bird watcher. That is also a bit problematic. And also, the screen is not here. So, this is a totally unusable photo. But wait until we get to the videos [...] look like the one we see over here. So, it changes all way around in basically every single one of these scene changes. Once again, a totally unusable piece of advertisement. But now to cap it off, let me actually show you one more video that I created from those earlier images. So here it is. This is so unusable. So this crane turns into a butterfly. Then this camera tilts on its own and then it basically kind of sets a fire underneath the tree trunk we have over here. And then there's [clears throat] even a person appearing in the smoke. I don't know what kind of a bird watchers nightmare this would be, but this is totally unusable, needless to mention. results.title: Holoworld on Solana: Project Review, Programs, Token, Metrics
results.content:
## Security and Audits

Holoworld maintains robust security measures to protect users and their assets:

### Smart Contract Security

The platform's smart contracts have undergone multiple audits:

 Certik completed a comprehensive audit in December 2023
 OtterSec performed a secondary audit in January 2024
 Regular internal security reviews and updates

### AI Safety Measures

The platform implements several safeguards for AI interactions:

 Content moderation systems
 Behavioral boundaries enforcement
 Data privacy protections
 Regular AI model auditing

### Platform Security

Additional security features include:

 Multi-signature wallet requirements for major platform changes
 Regular penetration testing
 Bug bounty program
 24/7 security monitoring

#### Contents [...] > Holoworld is revolutionizing digital interaction through its AI-powered character creation platform built on Solana. The project combines advanced AI technology with blockchain infrastructure to enable users to create, customize, and monetize virtual characters while maintaining decentralized ownership. Through its dual token system (HOLO and AVA) and comprehensive marketplace features, Holoworld facilitates a new paradigm of digital entertainment and social interaction. The platform currently manages over 100,000 character interactions daily, with AI agents processing visual and holographic data on-chain while engaging with the community.

## What is Holoworld? [...] ### Decentralized Ownership Model

Unlike centralized virtual character platforms, Holoworld ensures that creators maintain full ownership of their characters through blockchain-based smart contracts. This includes:

 Immutable ownership records
 Transparent revenue distribution
 Community-driven governance decisions
 Interoperable character assets

### Scalable Infrastructure

Built on Solana's high-performance blockchain, Holoworld can process thousands of character interactions simultaneously while maintaining low latency and transaction costs. This scalability enables complex multi-character scenarios and large-scale virtual events.

## Holoworld Features

### Character Marketplace

The Holoworld marketplace serves as a central hub for character trading and monetization. Users can:

results.title: Holo AI Review - The AI Tool That Turns Your Website Into 100+ Content Pieces
results.content:
Holo is an AI marketing platform designed to transform how founders and small teams create marketing content at scale. Think of it as having an entire creative agency working for you around the clock, but without the hefty retainer fees or endless revision cycles.
What Holo Does
At its core, Holo converts your website URL into hundreds of ready-to-launch marketing assets across multiple channels. It's built to solve a fundamental problem that solo founders and small teams face: the overwhelming demand for constant, high-quality content creation across ads, social media, and email campaigns.
The Brand DNA Intelligence System [...] This gives you access to thousands of proven content angles and formats that drive engagement and conversions.
Privacy and Data Security
Your brand data stays completely private. Holo uses full encryption, never shares your information, never trains on your data, and never reuses it for other purposes. You maintain absolute control over your brand assets from your first post to your hundredth campaign.
Performance Metrics
The platform claims an average 27% CTR lift across tested campaigns, suggesting that the AI-generated content doesn't just save time—it actively improves marketing performance compared to traditional methods. [...] you
